18&1&2011 i<+k tk, A 2- vf/lwpuk ds Li"Vhdj.k ds iSjk 5 dks fuEukuqlkj izfrLFkkfir fd;k tk,xk % ^^'kqYd esa fiNyh ckj fd, x, la'kks/u dh rkjh[k ls 6 (Ng) ekl dh vof/ ds Hkhrj dksbZ la'kks/u ugha fd;k tk,xk A** ¹Hkkjkjkizk@13013@564@10&11@lhvks@thlh iQjhnkckn (20-5&200-0) chvksVhº vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th August, 2013 S.O. 2491(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R. 838(E) dated 5-12-2008 and its amendment, M/s. DA Toll Road Private Limited was authorized to collect and -- 1 of 2 -- retain the fee for the development, operation and maintenance of the stretch from km. 20.500 to km. 200.000 (Delhi-Agra section) of NH-2 in the States of Haryana and Uttar Pradesh to six lane divided carriageway on Design, Build, Finanace, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT) basis vide No. S.O. 104(E) dated 18-1-2010. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the Natioanl Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification published vide No. S.O. 104(E) dated 18-1-2010. 1. The date of publication of the Notification bearing No. S.O. 104(E) may be read as 18-1-2011 instead of 18-1-2010. 2. Para 5 of the Explanation of the Notification shall be substituted as follows : "The revision of fee shall not be effected within a period of 6(six) months from the date of preceding revision of Fee." [NHAI/13013/564/10-11/CO/GC Faridabad (20.5-200.0)BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy.
